steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line
steps.content:
Reading the graph, the line passes through:
  • The y-intercept at $(0, 14)$
  • A point at approximately $(12, 0)$
These are easy to read directly from the grid.

steps.title: Calculate the slope using the two points
steps.content:
Apply the formula with $(x_1, y_1) = (0, 14)$ and $(x_2, y_2) = (12, 0)$:
$$\frac{0 - 14}{12 - 0} = \frac{-14}{12} = -\frac{7}{6} \approx -1.167$$
This value is closest to choice B — B is correct.
